market_pulse: Competitor activity peaks around major events (Breakaway Takeover, EDC Week aftermath); Encore Beach Club, XS, and OMNIA Dayclub dominate weekend bookings with established talent, while LIV maintains steady presence but lacks high-engagement Instagram/TikTok surge.

content_gaps.description: XS Nightclub, Encore Beach Club, and OMNIA Dayclub are actively announcing major EDM talent (The Chainsmokers, Kaskade, Major Lazer at Breakaway Takeover June 12-14). LIV posts lack equivalent tier announcements.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Secure and announce headline DJ/artist lineup for June events to match Breakaway momentum and Encore's Calvin Harris/Kygo bookings.

content_gaps.description: Competitors leverage hashtag campaigns (#edclv, #poolparty, #vegasvibes) with high TikTok video counts. LIV's hashtag presence is minimal across organic creator content.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create branded UGC hashtag campaign (e.g., #LIVtheVibe or #LIVmemories) with incentive-based reposting strategy for TikTok/Instagram to drive organic reach.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA Dayclub and Encore Beach Club use Stories for flash promotions and countdowns (rare but effective). LIV Stories activity not visible in search results.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Implement 48-hour flash promotions and countdown Stories for last-minute tickets/table reservations; test on Wednesday/Thursday for weekend sell-through.

influencer_activity.mention: Posted video of LIV Beach Las Vegas nightclub energy (~1 week ago); moderate engagement reflecting pool party vibes and danceable music.

Calvin Harris confirmed Saturday, May 23, 2026. Breakaway Takeover June 12-14 with The Chainsmokers, Kaskade, Major Lazer, ACRAZE.
Breakaway Takeover June 12-14 headliners announced. Diplo event May 1 (past). Ongoing strong EDM event calendar.

venues.summary: Knock2 (bass house) event on May 24 (past). Steady nightclub activity with upcoming event bookings; social posts present but lower engagement velocity than Encore/XS.

LIV Nightclub upcoming events lineup page; Westend tech-house debut March 27; consistent event booking calendar maintained.

venues.summary: EDC Week afterparty presence (May 13-17 EDC experience mentioned). Disco Lines event detected; steady pool club activity with seasonal booking strength.

venues.summary: Breakaway Takeover June 12-14 featuring The Chainsmokers, Kaskade, Major Lazer, ACRAZE; past Diplo event (May 1). Strong June lineup announced; competitive EDM positioning.

Diplo performing Friday May 1, 2026 at XS Nightclub. Past event, but reflects active booking calendar and EDM positioning.
EDM Identity coverage of Breakaway Takeover lineup. Press mentions Chainsmokers, Kaskade, Major Lazer; strong media pickup for June event.

venues.summary: Calvin Harris confirmed Saturday May 23 (past); Breakaway Takeover June 12-14 with Major Lazer + high-profile talent. Strong weekend pool party positioning with consistent A-tier DJ bookings.

venues.summary: NEW: OMNIA Dayclub opening May 15, 2026 at Caesars Palace (46,000 sq ft). Fisher performing live at grand opening. Major competitive threat with European beach club positioning and festival-level production.

raw_posts.content_summary: OMNIA Dayclub Las Vegas opens May 15, 2026 at Caesars Palace. 46,000-square-foot venue with European beach club design, 2 pools, 15 cabanas, 3 bars. Fisher performing at grand opening on May 15 at 11 AM.

venues.summary: OMNIA Dayclub pool venue at Caesars Palace. Fisher grand opening (May 15) and follow-up events (Ray Volpe, Cedric Gervais). Strong Q2 activation with new venue expansion.

raw_posts.content_summary: Fisher performing at OMNIA Dayclub grand opening Friday May 15, 2026 at 11 AM. New Vegas dayclub destination.
Cedric Gervais at OMNIA Nightclub Saturday May 9, 2026 (past event). OMNIA maintains dual nightclub + dayclub presence with consistent talent bookings.

venues.summary: Hakkasan pivoting to hip-hop/R&B focus in 2026. Resident DJ Franzen leading R&Bae Wednesdays. Upcoming talent: Tyga, BigXThaPlug, Fabolous. Genre differentiation strategy from EDM competitors.

raw_posts.content_summary: Las Vegas Weekly article: Hakkasan Nightclub announces hip-hop era with R&Bae Wednesdays (DJ Franzen) and upcoming performances by Tyga, BigXThaPlug, Fabolous. Genre shift from legacy EDM positioning.

venues.summary: Actually located at MGM Grand (not Venetian). Kygo confirmed Saturday May 23, 2026 (Memorial Day weekend). User-generated TikTok content showing Tiësto during EDC Week. Strong dayclub positioning.
